name: Ulcerous Canker

spell.name: Ulcerous Canker

heightened.text: The void damage and poison damage each increase by 1d4, and the persistent bleed damage increases by 2.

spell.success: The target takes half the initial damage and no persistent bleed damage.
spell.critical_failure: The creature takes double initial damage and double persistent bleed damage.

text: Weeping sores open on the target as you expose it to decay, dealing 1d4 void damage and 1d4 poison damage plus 1 persistent bleed damage. The target must attempt a Fortitude save.
